description: Monster animation mode definitions - mode names, tokens, and direction counts per animation type.

name.description: Animation mode name (e.g. Neutral, Walk, Attack1)

token.description: Animation token identifier (e.g. NU, WL, A1)

DT_Dir.description: Number of directions for Death animation

NU_Dir.description: Number of directions for Neutral animation

WL_Dir.description: Number of directions for Walk animation

GH_Dir.description: Number of directions for Get Hit animation

A1_Dir.description: Number of directions for Attack1 animation

A2_Dir.description: Number of directions for Attack2 animation

BL_Dir.description: Number of directions for Block animation

SC_Dir.description: Number of directions for Cast animation

S1_Dir.description: Number of directions for Skill1 animation

S2_Dir.description: Number of directions for Skill2 animation

S3_Dir.description: Number of directions for Skill3 animation

S4_Dir.description: Number of directions for Skill4 animation

DD_Dir.description: Number of directions for Dead animation

KB_Dir.description: Number of directions for Knockback animation

SQ_Dir.description: Number of directions for Sequence animation

RN_Dir.description: Number of directions for Run animation
